title: Burmannia capitata
taxonomy: Burmannia capitata is classified as a species within the genus Burmannia and the family Burmanniaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the burmanniads. The family Burmanniaceae belongs to the order Dioscoreales, a group of flowering plants that are primarily aquatic or semi-aquatic. This classification reflects the plant's unique adaptations and growth habits. Burmannia capitata is a type of flowering plant that is native to tropical regions of Asia and Australia.
